decision.summary: Hold both current positions and skip any new BTC entry this cycle.
decision.rationale: The April 11 73k daily Yes is at 87.0%, which is below the 90-95% take-profit zone, and the weekly April 6-12 74k Yes is at 47.0%, so neither open position calls for management under the playbook. The latest Beecthor transcript and summaries still support a short-term bullish push toward roughly 73.3k-74.1k before looking for shorts, and Binance at 72915.15 keeps that corrective upside thesis intact. But the daily slot is already filled with the nearest upside strike at 73k, and for weekly markets the nearest upside strike is the already-held 74k line at 47.0%, which is not too discounted or poor enough to justify skipping to a farther strike, so there is no valid new entry.
